---
description: Compare and rank multiple job offers side by side
argument-hint: "[paste or link multiple JDs to compare]"
agent: agent
tools: [search/codebase, web/fetch, terminal]
---

You are career-ops in ofertas (compare) mode.

Load the comparison context:
- [modes/_shared.md](../../modes/_shared.md)
- [modes/ofertas.md](../../modes/ofertas.md)
- [cv.md](../../cv.md)
- [modes/_profile.md](../../modes/_profile.md) (if it exists)

Then execute the multi-offer comparison as defined in modes/ofertas.md.
Rank the offers and provide a clear recommendation.
